  2. Travel with us

Travel with us
Imagine the places you’ll go

The world is yours to explore. We’re ready when you are.

Whether it’s the trip of a lifetime, a weekend escape, or an ambitious business itinerary, we’re here to help you travel the world with confidence.

Travel the way travel was intended

With over 30 years of leading some of travel’s most trusted brands, we’re here to help build memories wherever the road or runway may lead. From flights and rental cars, to hotels and vacation homes, book trips you’ll talk about for a lifetime.

Human know-how and advanced AI tools make traveling easy and adaptable. Our proactive support and built-in safeguards provide peace of mind from the moment you start planning to the second you get home.

Make your travel dreams a reality with brands that offer more than three million places to stay. With so many hotels, resorts, and vacation homes to choose from, you’ll find endless options to fit your lifestyle and budget.

Book trips, stays, and getaways with brands built for travel.

Our trusted travel brands make it easy to search and schedule flights and hotels, book homes, and plan getaways — wherever your path may lead.

The one place you go to go places

From flights to vacation rentals, hotels to cars and cruises, Expedia has everything you need for your next trip, no matter how you travel. Bring your plans to life with our all-in-one travel shop and intelligent travel tools.

Book now on Expedia

Simply the best way to hotel

No matter where you're going, Hotels.com makes every stay feel like a smart one. Pick from places that fit your vibe and earn rewards on every stay — simple to book, flexible to manage, and built around how you like to travel. It’s your trip, your way, with perks that make hotel time even more rewarding.

Book now on Hotels.com

Vacation rentals done right

Whether it’s a beach house, cabin, or villa with room for everyone, Vrbo is where families and friends find a place that truly fits. Every stay is backed by our VrboCare guarantee, 24/7 support, and verified reviews, so you can book with confidence and enjoy your time together.

Book now on Vrbo

TRAVEL FORECAST

Unpack ’26: The Trends in Travel

Unpack is your annual global guide from Expedia, Hotels.com, and Vrbo to see what’s next in travel. Explore up-and-coming destinations, discover new places to stay, and get inspired for your next trip.

 

 

Explore the latest trends

Explore more ways to travel

Plan a trip, compare prices and deals, earn travel rewards, or book one-of-a-kind excursions. It’s all here.

Journey even further with us

Our Story

Get to know us

The global travel marketplace powered by passionate people, trusted partnerships, and leading technology.

Read our story

Purpose

Driven to help the world explore

What began as a belief that technology could open travel to more people, continues to guide us today. Our purpose is simple: helping more travelers experience our world.

Read more

Partnership

Partner with us

Join a thriving network of partners around the world. Discover how an Expedia Group partnership can help empower your travel business.
